turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 90-5844, Foucha against Louisiana will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: JUSTICE WHITE
turns.text: As an opinion on file with the Clerk indicates the judgment of the Supreme Court of Louisiana is reversed. Justice O'Connor has filed an opinion concurring in part and concurring in the judgment; Justice Kennedy, joined by the Chief Justice, has filed a dissenting opinion; Justice Thomas has also filed a dissenting opinion in which the Chief Justice and Justice Scalia have joined.
